AboutPage.title: About Monopoly Bank App
AboutPage.description: This app is designed to simplify playing Monopoly. It replaces the banker and allows players to transfer money to each other independently, as well as take money from the bank (game creator only). All transactions are recorded in history.
features: Game creator sets the starting balance and gets an invitation link.
Players follow the link, enter their name, and join the game.
The main page displays balances of all players and the bank.
To transfer money, click on another player (not yourself) or the bank — a digital keyboard will open.
The game creator sees a green 💰 button next to each player — it allows issuing money from the bank.
Transaction history is available on the 'History' tab.
AboutPage.contactEmail: For any questions, write to email:

GamePage.creatorHint: 🔑 You are the creator. Green 💰 button issues money from the bank.

GamePage.bankTransferOnlyForCreator: Only the creator can issue money from the bank
